rule_metadata.author: Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Abnormal LSASS Child and Parent Process Relationships

rules.rule_text:
title: Abnormal LSASS Child and Parent Process Relationships
id: 67ba1ddd-4510-42d5-aa78-83bed66bd684
status: experimental
description: Detects potential lsass.exe abuse based on unusual and suspicious parent-child
  relationships. Inspired by the 2022 Red Canary Threat Detection report.
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/techniques/lsass-memory/
author: Micah Babinski
date: 2022/11/03
tags:
- attack.credential_access
- attack.t1003.001
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection1:
    Image|endswith:
    - \cmd.exe
    - \powershell.exe
    - \regsvr32.exe
    - \mstsc.exe
    - \dllhost.exe
    ParentImage|endswith: \lsass.exe'
  selection2:
    Image|endswith: \lsass.exe
    ParentImage|endswith:
    - \explorer.exe
    - \cmd.exe
    - \lsass.exe
  condition: selection1 or selection2
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: medium
